creator: wosch@FreeBSD.org
text:
The lang/nawk port install a manual page /usr/local/man/man1/nawk.1.gz but man(1) cannot parse it.

/usr/bin/man /usr/local/man/man1/nawk.1.gz 
gzcat: /usr/local/man/man1/nawk.1.gz: not in gzip format

file /usr/local/man/man1/nawk.1.gz 
/usr/local/man/man1/nawk.1.gz: troff or preprocessor input, ASCII text
